message:
feat(writing): enhance tooltip infrastructure with extended variant support

Improve the core tooltip system with better positioning, scroll handling,
and expanded color variant support for article-specific theming.

tooltip-shell.tsx:
- Add scroll and resize event listeners for dynamic repositioning
- Center tooltips on trigger with screen boundary clamping
- Expand variant support to include orange, rose, and blue themes
- Add corresponding color values to variantStyles mapping
- Improve touch accessibility with better button semantics

raptorq-tooltip-shell.tsx:
- Add accentColor prop for dynamic theme customization
- Improve tooltip positioning with updatePosition callback
- Add scroll/resize listeners for responsive behavior
- Reduce hover delay from 300ms to 250ms for snappier UX

math-tooltip.tsx (new):
- Unified math tooltip component with all color variants
- Consistent styling across cyan, purple, emerald, amber,
  orange, rose, and blue themes
- Proper integration with TooltipShell

jargon-types.ts (new):
- Shared TypeScript interface for jargon term definitions
- Standardizes term, short, long, analogy, and why fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
